title: CBSE 10th, 12th Results 2026 Date And Time Live: Class 10 Result Soon, Check Details
description: CBSE Board 10th, 12th Results 2026 Date and Time Live Updates: The Class 10 board examinations concluded on March 11, while the Class 12 examinations are ongoing and will conclude on April 10. Exams for both classes began on February 17.
